label:
寻星者协会恩惠
Starfinder Society Boons

Secondary Initiation.name: 次级启蒙 Secondary Initiation
Secondary Initiation.description:
花费: 8 AcP

获得你所选择的一个组织的选项使用权限。

Cost: 8 AcP

Gain access to options from an organization of your choice.

Revival Protocol.name: 复苏协议 Revival Protocol
Revival Protocol.description:
花费：40 AcP

获得一次复活仪式的效果。

Cost: 40 AcP

Gain the benefits of a resurrect ritual.

Legacy Admittance: Leshy.name: 传承准入：植裔 Legacy Admittance: Leshy
Legacy Admittance: Leshy.description:
花费：8 AcP

使用《Pathfinder Player Core》中找到的菜蔬族裔来创建一个玩家角色。

Cost: 8 AcP

Build a player character with the leshy ancestry found in the Pathfinder Player Core.

Legacy Admittance: Elf.name: 遗俗准入：精灵 Legacy Admittance: Elf
Legacy Admittance: Elf.description:
花费：8 AcP

使用《Pathfinder Player Core》中找到的精灵族裔来创建一个玩家角色。

Cost: 8 AcP

Build a player character with the elf ancestry found in the Pathfinder Player Core.

Mnemonic Editor.name: 助忆编辑器 Mnemonic Editor
Mnemonic Editor.description:
花费：20 AcP

重建一名已完成超过 3 次冒险的 PC。

Cost: 20 AcP

Rebuild a PC who has completed more than 3 adventures.

Legacy Admittance: Dwarf.name: 传承准入：矮人 Legacy Admittance: Dwarf
Legacy Admittance: Dwarf.description:
花费：8 AcP

使用《Pathfinder Player Core》中找到的矮人族裔来构建一个玩家角色。

Cost: 8 AcP

Build a player character with the dwarf ancestry found in the Pathfinder Player Core.

Legacy Admittance: Halfling.name: 传承准入：半身人 Legacy Admittance: Halfling
Legacy Admittance: Halfling.description:
花费：8 AcP

使用《Pathfinder Player Core》中找到的半身人族裔创建一个玩家角色。

Cost: 8 AcP

Build a player character with the halfling ancestry found in the Pathfinder Player Core.

Expanded Summoning - Pathfinder Monster.name: 扩展召唤 - Pathfinder Monster Core Expanded Summoning - Pathfinder Monster Core
Expanded Summoning - Pathfinder Monster.description:
花费：40 AcP

该角色获得对《Pathfinder Monster Core》中生物的使用权限，以用于召唤法术。

Cost: 40 AcP

This character gains access to creatures from Pathfinder Monster Core for the purposes of summoning spells.

Legacy Admittance: Goblin.name: 旧版准入：地精 Legacy Admittance: Goblin
Legacy Admittance: Goblin.description:
花费：8 AcP

使用《Pathfinder Player Core》中找到的地精族裔来创建一名玩家角色。

Cost: 8 AcP

Build a player character with the goblin ancestry found in the Pathfinder Player Core.

Legacy Admittance: Gnome.name: 传承准入：侏儒 Legacy Admittance: Gnome
Legacy Admittance: Gnome.description:
花费: 8 AcP

使用《Pathfinder Player Core》中找到的侏儒族裔来创建一个玩家角色。

Cost: 8 AcP

Build a player character with the gnome ancestry found in the Pathfinder Player Core.

Starfinder Condition Removal.name: 星际探险家状态移除 Starfinder Condition Removal
Starfinder Condition Removal.description:
花费：20 AcP

该角色移除一个可通过法术解除的状态。此恩惠不需要额外支付信用点。

Cost: 20 AcP

This character removes a condition that could be resolved with a spell. This boon has no additional credit cost.
